list.name: Changes
list.comment: add tle checks and fixes for errors for the scanned orbital element tles

task.summary: updated telea_heal_subpoint to have misreadings of subpoint
updated some scans for different types of physical image
update oscan to use one line instead of blocks
add raw2area and mcidas helper functions
add a way to compare tles instance to instance for digitized orbital elements
add tle checks and fixes for errors for the scanned orbital element tles

MESSAGE.value: updated telea_heal_subpoint to have misreadings of subpoint
updated some scans for different types of physical image
update oscan to use one line instead of blocks
add raw2area and mcidas helper functions
add a way to compare tles instance to instance for digitized orbital elements
add tle checks and fixes for errors for the scanned orbital element tles

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: add tle checks and fixes for errors for the scanned orbital element tles
